_Write a concise description of the change to the production technology stack, such as changes to programming languages, application frameworks, or database systems, that you're proposing._

Discussion thread: [Link]

## Current state

_Describe the technology in use today, and where it falls short._

## Proposed change

_Describe the proposed change. Which technology is added, replaced, or removed? How does it integrate with the existing stack?_

## Motivation

_Why should this change be made? What problem does it solve, and for whom? What is the expected outcome?_

## Impact

HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW

_What is affected — other tools, the build or deployment pipeline, contributor workflows? Note any migration effort and identify dependencies that need to be considered._

## Alternatives

_What other options were considered, if any? Why is this one preferred?_

## Additional notes

_Any open questions, risks, or context that would help stakeholders evaluate this idea._
